gap_summaries.description: _kill_process_tree extracted pid from TimeoutExpired.args which contains (cmd, timeout) not a process; switched to Popen-based pid access
profile_customize_facts and profile_activation_blocks pushed product_profile.py to 536 LOC (over 500 soft limit); extracted to profile_bridge.py
OSError from proc.communicate() would leak zombie process; added OSError handler with _safe_kill cleanup
Empty cmd list would cause IndexError on cmd[0] in error path; added empty-cmd guard

spec_requirements_implemented: §5: Profile invariants reach generation agents via BMAD customize.toml 3-layer merge + persistent_facts + activation prepend/append (profile_bridge.py)
§6.4: Timeout enforcement via subprocess.Popen(timeout=...) + psutil SIGKILL on expiry (adjudicator.py)
§6.4: Timed-out collector emits {status: timeout, findings: ['TIMEOUT: <tool> exceeded <N>s']} (gate_schema.py make_timeout_evidence)
§6.4: Adjudicator treats timeout as error for aggregation (fail-closed) (gate_rules.py verdict_for_collector_status)
§6.4: Waiver validation: failing_categories must exactly match gate's failing categories (gate_rules.py _check_categories)
§6.4: Waiver validation: signature deterministically computed over canonical-JSON (gate_schema.py compute_waiver_signature)
§6.4: Waiver validation: profile_hash must equal gate file's profile.hash (gate_rules.py _check_profile_hash)
§6.4: Adjudicator re-checks expires_at on every gate-file reuse (gate_rules.py is_waiver_expired)
§6.4: Invariant registry (invariants.yaml) with per-DG/ADR entries (msme-erp.invariants.yaml + gate_schema.py validate_invariant_entry)
§14: GateDecision/GateRendered ride UnknownEvent forward-compat (documented in adjudicator.py docstring)
